channel.title: Drifting on gand_elf place
channel.description: Recent content in Drifting on gand_elf place

item.title: HellTaker character friends
item.description:
Archangel Michael: Charles

Pandemonica The Tired Demon/The Sadistic Demon : Hugo
“Keep it up and you might still survive the day with no fingers broken.”
“I could really use some coffee. I’m not myself without it.”

Modeus The Lustful Demon : Clothilde
“You and me. Now.”
“They always say that… and then they try to run away. I’ll have to break your knees just in case.”

Cerberus The Triple Demon : Virgil
“Yes! At last! It’s time to corrupt the mortal realm! "
